主线角色性格方面是非常丰满的，心理活动方面描写的很好，剧情没有什么问题，也没有什么毒点，是比较推荐的一本漫综。
然后作者如果动漫资料储备多的话，希望再加一些别的动漫角色"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724034067,"group_id":"7385202821810883609","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3ZX9BruMmhQm7c81JwRGl8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1838de3bea7b46319b666198d7d4c9c7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535039&x-signature=24G5I2vOZPIGc8D%2FT1zj6oGLCT0%3D","user_id":"111240874441","user_name":"白衣无恙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111240874441","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1698773595,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7385202821810883609","book_info":{"abstract":"坚韧、热情、纯洁却意外笨拙的少女们总是令人心疼。
于是有一天，不分春夏秋冬，百花盛开，少年与少女们相遇了。
真昼：“你知道吗？你就是我的白昼。”
结衣：“我就知道，小清对我最好啦！”
雪乃：“总有一天，我一定会拯救你。”
总之，这是他与她们相互救赎、相互陪伴的故事。
